llm_items.context: In the year ended December 31, 2025, 54% of our revenue came from government customers and 46% came from commercial customers.
In the year ended December 31, 2025, 54% of our revenue came from government customers and 46% came from commercial customers.
Our top three customers together accounted for 16% and 17% of our revenue for the years ended December 31, 2025 and 2024, respectively.
In the year ended December 31, 2025, we generated 74% of our revenue from customers in the United States and the remaining 26% from non-U.S. customers.
Revenue from the United Kingdom was $427.4 million, representing 10% of total revenue in 2025.
Revenue from the Rest of world was $728.0 million, representing 16% of total revenue in 2025.
Noncancelable purchase commitments primarily relate to purchase commitments for third-party cloud hosting services... Totaling $1,758,951 thousand.
Under one of its third-party cloud services agreements, as amended, the Company has committed to spend at least $1.95 billion over ten contract years through September 30, 2033.
